channel.title: MoneySignals Daily Blog
channel.description: Plain-English daily market signals: news, Washington activity, short flow, sentiment, and model watchlists. Educational only.

item.title: Cautious Sentiment Dominates Crypto, But Traditional Safe Havens Rally
item.description: The Crypto Fear & Greed index sitting at an extreme 19/100 signals deep fear in digital assets, yet this isn't translating into broad market panic.…

item.title: Energy & Defense Resurgence
item.description: The strongest convergent narrative today centers on energy and defense assets. XLE and DFEN both carry 2-Bullish/0-Bearish news signals, while OXY sits at…

item.title: Defensive Rotation & Safe-Haven Demand
item.description: The dominant narrative today centers on a flight to safety. GLD (4 bullish mentions, zero bearish) signals strong gold demand, while VXX bullish sentiment…
